mapper.select: SELECT osmid, spot_name, y, x, floor, geom AS geometry FROM nodes WHERE osmid IS NOT NULL
SELECT osmid, spot_name, y, x, floor, geom AS geometry FROM nodes WHERE osmid IS NOT NULL AND spot_name = #{spotName}
SELECT osmid, spot_name, y, x, floor, geom AS geometry FROM nodes WHERE osmid IS NOT NULL AND spot_name = #{spotName} LIMIT 1
